title: MCP Tools
description: 23 MCP servers providing 165 tools for cloud management, observability, GitHub, knowledge, and platform administration.

sections.title: MCP Server Overview
sections.description: OpenAgentic integrates 23 MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers providing 165 tools for cloud management, observability, code execution, and more.

items.description: Get full details of an agent template.

sections.title: Aws MCP Server

items.name: call_aws
items.description: Execute AWS CLI commands with validation and proper error handling.

items.name: suggest_aws_commands
items.description: Suggest AWS CLI commands based on a natural language query.

items.name: aws_list_accounts
items.description: List AWS accounts accessible to the current user via Identity Center.

items.name: aws_identity
items.description: Get your current AWS identity (who am I?).

items.name: aws_cost_summary
items.description: Get a summary of your AWS costs for a specified number of days.

items.name: aws_cost_by_service
items.description: Get a breakdown of your AWS costs by service for a specified number of days.

items.name: aws_list_ec2
items.description: List all EC2 instances in your AWS account.

items.name: aws_list_s3
items.description: List all S3 buckets in your AWS account.
